rows.label: qev070103_MSG0016
rows.name:
Um, that alien named Doctor B
living on the outskirts of the Industrial District...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0017
rows.name:
Who exactly is he?
Do you know what kind of person he is?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0018
rows.name:
He buys a lot of parts from me,
so he's a good customer, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0019
rows.name:
I have no idea what he's building,
and sometimes he speaks words I can't understand at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0020
rows.name:
There are too many mysteries; he's a bit creepy.
When did he even settle in NLA anyway?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0001
rows.name:
If you want dirt-cheap recycled goods,
come to Graham.
I'll set you up with prices unimaginable on the surface market![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Hm? Doctor B sent you?
I see, welcome!
Thanks for always buying so many things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0003
rows.name:
If it's a car, I have a few prepared.
From left to right: a blue standard car, an affordable beat-up car,
and a red luxury car...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0004
rows.name:
Which one will it be?
I'll give you a discount![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_JNK0010
rows.name: Blue Standard Car

rows.label: qev070103_SEL0011
rows.name: Purchase the standard car.

rows.label: qev070103_JNK0020
rows.name: Affordable Beat-up Car

rows.label: qev070103_SEL0021
rows.name: Purchase the affordable beat-up car.

rows.label: qev070103_JNK0030
rows.name: Red Luxury Car

rows.label: qev070103_SEL0031
rows.name: Purchase the red luxury car.

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, that's a reasonable choice.
That'll be 10,000G, is that okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_JNK0040
rows.name: Buy

rows.label: qev070103_SEL0041
rows.name: Purchase the blue standard car for 10,000G.

rows.label: qev070103_JNK0070
rows.name: Don't Buy

rows.label: qev070103_SEL0071
rows.name: Reconsider and don't buy.

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0007
rows.name:
Are you sure you want this junker?
That'll be 1,000G.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_JNK0050
rows.name: Buy

rows.label: qev070103_SEL0051
rows.name: Purchase the affordable beat-up car for 1,000G.

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yeah, yeah!
This one's incredibly cool, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0010
rows.name:
The price is a ridiculous 100,000G, but
I think you'll enjoy the best drive ever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_JNK0060
rows.name: Buy

rows.label: qev070103_SEL0061
rows.name: Purchase the red luxury car for 100,000G.

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0011
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]Thanks for your patronage! As a special service,
I'll deliver it to Doctor B's place for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0014
rows.name:
Want to think about it a bit more?
Once you've decided which car you want,
just let me know anytime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0015
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]Wait, hm? It looks like you don't have enough money.
I definitely need payment in cash this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hehe... I'm glad Doctor B liked the car
you bought from me the other day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070103_MSG0013
rows.name:
Well... It's a product matching its price, so
I don't think you should drive it around
anywhere too conspicuous.[ST:wait ]
